detail.description:
■ Goldrush Server Sven Pre-Registration in Progress ■

“The master of this world…is now you.”
On a vast continent ruled by nine Lords,
you have been chosen by Orphe
to awaken as the legendary tenth Lord.
A grand tale of freedom, battle, and glory begins now!

■ Play Your Way, A Class System Without Limits!
Choose from over 60 classes and switch between them instantly.
Mix and match weapons and combat styles to define your unique playstyle.
Customize your skill sets with the Ability + Tag system!
detail.releaseNotes:
- Server Transfer Phase 5 (May 13 after the maintenance – May 17)
- Event Dungeon Ebon Heretic Inquisition Added
- Barthes' Deluxe Check-in Event
- Deligeon's Special Mission Event
- Lucky Draw New Schedule Added
- New Mount Greed's End Griffin Added
- 7 New Products Added
- Battle Pass Season 17 Begins
- Bug fixes and other error fixes
